shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' .agents/skills/mempal-memory/SKILL.md && printf '\\n--- status ---\\n' && git status --short && printf '\\n--- files ---\\n' && rg --files src/components/Tooltip src/utils | head -80"
/bin/bash -lc 'mempal search "react-tooltip delegated event target non-element closest anchor resolution" --json --top-k 5'

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' src/utils/resolve-data-tooltip-anchor.ts && printf '\\n--- related refs ---\\n' && rg -n \"resolveDataTooltipAnchor|closest\\(|event\\.target|relatedTarget|nodeType\" src src/test"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,480p' src/components/Tooltip/use-tooltip-events.tsx && printf '\\n--- test context ---\\n' && sed -n '250,330p' src/test/tooltip-interaction-behavior.spec.js && printf '\\n--- package scripts ---\\n' && node -e \"const p=require('./package.json'); console.log(p.scripts)\""
